taxonomy: Acanthophaca leiosemia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a part of the genus Acanthophaca, which is a small genus of legumes found in Central Asia. Acanthophaca leiosemia is a perennial herb, native to the mountainous regions of Tajikistan. The classification of Acanthophaca leiosemia is still being studied, and more research is needed to fully understand its relationships within the plant kingdom. Further taxonomic analysis may provide more insights into its classification within the Fabaceae family.
